task_completion.description: Access Dr. Aisha Kamara's tax documents from the specified directory.

task_completion.description: Complete the return by entering T4 hospital income, T4A locum income on T2125, RRSP, professional expenses, and spouse information.

task_completion.description: Save the return with the specified filename.
